dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group at 15:06:48 UTC.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 4/4 agents responded: Narvi Irondeep (5.5s), Míriel Goldthread (6.3s), Elanor Brightloom (9.9s), Orion Solarin (142.7s). 100% response rate. CRITICAL FIX: Previous runs #11-17 falsely reported Orion as non-responsive. He was responding at ~2.5min but our 2-min polling window missed him. Corrected.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 4 used correct format. However all reported idle/standing by — no active tasks. -4 for uniformly idle state suggesting underutilization.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Narvi: 5.55s, Míriel: 6.32s, Elanor: 9.85s, Orion: 142.7s. Avg: 41.1s. Three agents showed latency regression (prev avg 4.64s, now 7.24s excl Orion). Orion consistently ~2.5min — very slow but not absent. -18 points for Orion's extreme latency and overall regression.

improvements: MAJOR BUG FIX: Discovered Orion Solarin WAS responding to all previous tests — my 2-min polling window was too short. His ~2.5min response time fell outside the window, causing 7 false 'missed' reports. Sent correction/apology to group. Previous reports #11-17 had inflated Response Rate penalties and wrong 'Orion absent' issues. Real issue is Orion's extreme latency (~143s vs ~7s for others), not absence.
issues: 1) Orion Solarin extreme latency: ~143s response time vs ~7s avg for others. Not a miss, but 20x slower — needs investigation into why his processing is so delayed. 2) Overall latency regression: Narvi/Míriel/Elanor averaged 7.24s this run vs 4.64s last run. 3) All 4 agents idle — team underutilized between challenges. 4) CRON FIX NEEDED: Polling window must be extended from 2min to 4min+ to capture Orion's responses.
